instruction: 把候选抽取策略改成：每次打开 F4 时，优先从不同稀有度中各抽一个候选，避免同一轮出现重复稀有度；若可用稀有度不足，再按现有权重补齐剩余槽位；已获得条目仍不得再次出现，并保留现有触发键、桥接、事件通道和 UI 交互。

userInputsUsed: 把候选抽取策略改成：每次打开 F4 时，优先从不同稀有度中各抽一个候选，避免同一轮出现重复稀有度；若可用稀有度不足，再按现有权重补齐剩余槽位；已获得条目仍不得再次出现，并保留现有触发键、桥接、事件通道和 UI 交互。

patchPlan.summary: Replace drawForSelection method to implement tier-diverse selection: draw one candidate from each distinct tier first, then fill remaining slots with weighted random from remaining pool. Preserves duplicatePolicy=forbid and session state semantics.

operations.reason: Implement new selection policy: prioritize one draw per distinct tier to avoid duplicate rarities in same round, then weighted fill for remaining slots. Maintains duplicatePolicy=forbid and session-aware filtering.
